steps.title: Read the green tile count from the table
steps.content: Looking at the intersection of the Total row and Green column, there are 40 green tiles out of 100 total tiles.

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content: Probability of selecting a green tile: $$P = \frac{40}{100} = \frac{2}{5} = 0.4$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $0.4$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $0.4$.
